description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style guard rail constructed from dark metallic tubing, designed to serve as a protective barrier in urban environments. The structure consists of a horizontal top rail and a parallel bottom rail, connected by evenly spaced vertical bars, all made from the same cylindrical metal material. The ends of the rail are smoothly rounded, and the entire assembly is anchored to the ground with wide, flat base plates for stability. The surface has a slightly weathered, matte metallic finish, suggesting durability and resistance to outdoor conditions. There are no visible decorative elements or reflective markings, emphasizing its utilitarian function. The spacing between the vertical bars is consistent, providing both a physical and visual barrier without obstructing sightlines.
description: A sturdy, dark metallic guard rail with evenly spaced vertical bars and rounded ends, mounted on wide base plates. Its weathered, matte finish and utilitarian design make it suitable for urban protection.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the guard rail, with all vertical bars and both rounded ends visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the rail and the depth of the base plate, with vertical bars appearing as thin lines.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the same arrangement of vertical bars and rounded ends.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and base plate, mirroring view 1.
